overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a scenic rural village area. The character travels along dirt paths past wooden fences and thatched-roof huts, encounters a dog and villagers, and walks through a muddy cow pasture with snow-capped mountains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt road approaching a covered wooden bridge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path toward a covered wooden bridge with cows grazing in fenced pastures to the left

notable_agents.action: cows grazing behind wooden fence in the pasture

entered.detail: large wooden covered bridge with triangular roof and open sides
rustic wooden post and rail fence lining the pasture
mountain range with snow visible on peaks in the far distance
unpaved dirt trail with patches of grass
tall evergreen trees lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rural dirt path with wooden fences lining cow pastures on the left. Geralt walks steadily toward a large covered wooden bridge in the distance, with snow-capped mountains visible on the horizon and pine trees on the right. Cows graze peacefully behind the fence as the character approaches the bridge structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside path with stone walls and scattered trees

events.description: black dog runs past the character from right to left across the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as a black dog runs past from the right, then approaching a villager

notable_agents.action: black dog running quickly past the character from right to left
villager in red clothing walking along the path in the opposite direction

entered.detail: low rough stone wall lining the right side of the path
traditional wooden hut with straw thatched roof visible in the distance
tall leafless tree with bare branches

segments.scene_description: After passing the covered bridge, the path opens into countryside with stone walls appearing on the right. A black dog suddenly runs past from the right side of the screen. The character continues walking past a dead tree and approaches a thatched-roof hut in the distance, eventually passing a villager walking the opposite way.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural village lane with thatched-roof huts and stone walls

events.description: entering the village area with clustered thatched-roof buildings and stone walls

agents.ego_description: walking through the village between stone walls and passing close to thatched-roof huts

entered.detail: rough stone walls lining both sides of the narrow village path
raised wooden platform attached to a village hut

segments.scene_description: The character enters a proper village area with traditional thatched-roof huts and stone walls lining the path. The space feels more enclosed as the buildings cluster closer together. The path winds between the stone walls and wooden structures, transitioning from open countryside to a more defined village lane.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy cow pasture with scattered wooden fences

events.description: entering the muddy pasture field with grazing cows

agents.ego_description: walking through the muddy pasture among the grazing cows, navigating between the animals

notable_agents.action: brown and white cows grazing and standing in the muddy field, some moving aside as the character passes

entered.detail: open muddy pasture ground with patches of grass and standing water
cluster of buildings and huts visible in the background across the field

segments.scene_description: Exiting the village lane, the scene opens into a wide muddy pasture filled with cows. The ground becomes wet and muddy as the character walks directly through the herd of brown and white cattle. The village buildings now appear in the background as the character moves deeper into the open field.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from an open rural path through a quaint village and into a muddy livestock pasture. It begins with a steady walk along a dirt path lined by wooden fences and grazing cows, moving toward a large covered bridge with snow-capped mountains looming on the horizon. As the camera passes the bridge, the landscape shifts to open countryside with stone walls and a passing black dog before the path narrows as it enters a cluster of traditional thatched-roof huts. The scene then transitions from the enclosed village lane back into the open air, where the ground becomes wet and saturated. Finally, the camera moves deep into a wide, muddy field, walking directly through a herd of brown and white cattle as the village buildings recede into the background.
